'''zatofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hts|hts]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-t-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hts|hts]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zatofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zætefeth|zætefeth]] || [[word:zætefej|zætefej]] || [[word:zætefesh|zætefesh]] || [[word:zætefe|zætefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zatotofoth|zatotofoth]] || [[word:zatotofoj|zatotofoj]] || [[word:zatotofosh|zatotofosh]] || [[word:zatotofo|zatotofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zatofoth|zatofoth]] || [[word:zatofoj|zatofoj]] || [[word:zatofosh|zatofosh]] || [[word:zatofo|zatofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zatoffoth|zatoffoth]] || [[word:zatoffoj|zatoffoj]] || [[word:zatoffosh|zatoffosh]] || [[word:zatoffof|zatoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zatofotho|zatofotho]] || [[word:zatofojo|zatofojo]] || [[word:zatofosho|zatofosho]] || [[word:zatofoko|zatofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zatofoth|zatofoth]] || [[word:zatofoj|zatofoj]] || [[word:zatofosh|zatofosh]] || [[word:zatofo|zatofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zatofothol|zatofothol]] || [[word:zatofojol|zatofojol]] || [[word:zatofoshol|zatofoshol]] || [[word:zatofokol|zatofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zatofothotho|zatofothotho]] || [[word:zatofojojo|zatofojojo]] || [[word:zatofoshosho|zatofoshosho]] || [[word:zatofoko|zatofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zatofothon|zatofothon]] || [[word:zatofojon|zatofojon]] || [[word:zatofoshon|zatofoshon]] || [[word:zatofokon|zatofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zatofothoro|zatofothoro]] || [[word:zatofojoro|zatofojoro]] || [[word:zatofoshoro|zatofoshoro]] || [[word:zatofokoro|zatofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
